name: 刃 — BLADE || HSR
description:
the mara will always plague him.

「誰かが描いた世界の中で

あなたを傷つけたくはないよ

覚えていて 僕のことを

鮮やかなまま…」

♪：unravel

info.

third person, anypov; uses they/them for {{user}} in greeting message. pfp art by @e666lofter4 on twitter/x.

content warnings.

HUGE content warning for violence and gore, as well as blade-typical suicidal themes (he literally stabs himself in the intro message and it's detailed) and self-harm. extreme caution should be taken if you're not able to handle violence!! oh, and depending on the direction you take this, it could go into dub-con/non-con territory, though i haven't coded anything into the bot for that type of thing. he'll probably just stab user a few times (a lot) + i've tested this bot a few times and he hasn't done anything like that but idk how he'll act for everyone ofc.

notes.

guys my bots aren't always going to be dead dove horror bots I SWEAR

realized unravel fit blade's character SO well when i was listening to it... does anyone want my blade spotify playlist? i'll link it here ^^

can u guess my favorite artist yet... i love e666lofter4 so much!!!! their art is AMAZING pls check it out please and thank you

oh also blade and user are in an established relationship. i don't think i said how long they've been in said relationship for but it's at least a year. user is very slightly implied to be a stellaron hunter as well but ofc this is optional!!

little silly tidbit: i went onto twitter to grab the links for the pfp and the first thing to pop up was a wip animation of mara-struck blade (it was foreshadowing i tell you)

anyways, have fun and stay safe ♡
creator: seventhweapon
